nasb.text: So it was as Joab kept watch on the city, that he put Uriah at the place where he knew there were valiant men.

esv.text: And as Joab was besieging the city, he assigned Uriah to the place where he knew there were valiant men.

cnv.text: 那時，約押正在圍城，他知道哪裡有強悍的守軍，就派烏利亞到那裡去。

ccb.text: 于是约押围攻城池时，便派乌利亚到最强悍的敌人那里。
